page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.26xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ecs.i3 family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 104 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 7.38 GB of RAM per core.

A key characteristic of the ecs.i3.26xlarge is its integrated local storage, which consists of 23038 GB of SSD capacity. This massive local storage volume is bundled directly with the instance. For network connectivity, the server provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high resource density, featuring 104 dedicated cores, 768.0 GB of RAM, and over 23 TB of local SSD storage, the instance offers a specialized hardware profile for workloads requiring massive local storage capacity and high memory density. The dedicated CPU allocation with one thread per core ensures predictable compute performance. This configuration is suitable for large-scale databases, high-throughput storage systems, and data-intensive applications that benefit from low-latency local SSD access and substantial memory capacity.
description: The Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.26xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server instance within the ecs.i3 family, utilizing the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 104 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, with a dedicated allocation of one thread per core. The system includes 768.0 GB of RAM, translating to 7.38 GB of memory per core. A defining feature of this instance is its bundled local storage, which provides 23038 GB of SSD capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Designed without a GPU, this high-density configuration is optimized for storage-heavy and memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale database deployments, distributed file systems, and data-intensive applications that require substantial local storage capacity and predictable compute performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.26xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 104 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 768 GB of RAM, 23038 GB of bundled local SSD storage, and a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

tagline: A high-capacity storage and memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and over twenty-three terabytes of local SSD storage.

768.0 GB of system memory providing 7.38 GB per core

32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Optimized for large-scale databases and storage-intensive workloads
